privileged_info_summary: Task auto_stretch_contrast@1 uses real Unsplash image URLs (both accessible and valid) that produce 800x533 JPEG images with low contrast (std dev ~26.6-26.8 per grayscale analysis). The task verifies GIMP's Colors→Auto→Stretch Contrast feature, which is a documented built-in GIMP function. Verification checks histogram expansion, contrast improvement via standard deviation, black point darkening, white point brightening, and meaningful pixel changes using PIL and NumPy analysis. Configuration: 60-second timeout, maximum 5 steps, sparse rewards.
